Questions, answered

What is Longevity Coffee+?

Vivi Longevity Coffee is a premium blend of 100% Arabica coffee from Mexico and Guatemala, infused with clinically dosed NAD+ precursors, collagen and antioxidants.

What does Vivi support?

Vivi is designed to support smooth energy, sharper focus, gut health, glowing skin, recovery and healthy aging as part of your daily routine.

Is it safe to drink every day?

Vivi is designed as a daily coffee ritual and is third-party tested. If you are pregnant, nursing, taking medication or have a condition, check with your physician.

When will I feel results?

Many customers look for smoother energy immediately. Longer-term wellness benefits come from consistent daily use.

What if I do not like it?

Vivi includes a 30-day risk-free trial on first purchase.

Can I cancel subscription?

Yes. Subscription language from the source states you can pause or cancel anytime.
